title: La casa del terror
writer: Juan García, Gilberto Martínez Solares, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Germán Valdés, Yolanda Varela, Lon Chaney Jr.
plot: Casimiro, night watchman at a wax museum of horrors, is even more sleepy than his usual laziness makes him - because his boss, the Professor, is secretly draining blood from him while he dozes to use in experiments in raising the ...
